sections.heading: Context
sections.text: Northstar Health Analytics is scaling its European customer operations team and needs consistent, fair hiring decisions as it grows.

sections.heading: Required qualification: process coordination
sections.text: Experience coordinating structured multi-stakeholder processes and maintaining accurate tracking records is required.

sections.heading: Required qualification: screening judgement
sections.text: Experience applying structured evaluation criteria to make or support screening decisions is required.

sections.heading: Required qualification: communication
sections.text: The role requires clear communication with hiring managers and candidates about decisions and next steps.

sections.heading: Preferred qualification
sections.text: Direct end-to-end recruitment screening experience in a fast-growing organisation is preferred.

sections.heading: Evidence rule
sections.text: Recommendations must be grounded only in information visible in the role description and candidate CV. Do not infer unsupported experience.

sections.heading: Equivalent experience rule
sections.text: Equivalent experience should be considered where a CV demonstrates comparable structured evaluation or stakeholder coordination work.

sections.heading: Uncertainty rule
sections.text: If evidence supports relevant transferable capability but a required screening capability remains uncertain, hold for further review rather than reject or advance automatically.

sections.heading: People and Operations Coordinator, Saukala Global (2022–present)
sections.text: Coordinated candidate scheduling, interview follow-ups, and communication between hiring managers and applicants across several open roles. Maintained internal tracking sheets for candidate progress, interview stages, missing feedback, and follow-up actions. Supported preparation of structured interview packs, role handover notes, and evaluation templates for hiring managers. Flagged incomplete candidate information and delayed feedback to line managers, but did not independently assess candidate suitability or make screening recommendations. Assisted with onboarding preparation after hiring decisions had already been made. Improved internal follow-up processes for open roles by reducing missed communication steps and clarifying who needed to respond at each stage. Worked mainly in an operational support role rather than a formal recruiter, talent partner, or strategic hiring role.

sections.heading: Project and Client Support Associate, Suvion Digital (2019–2022)
sections.text: Managed communication across client, operations, and delivery teams in a growing SME. Tracked project stages, deadlines, and action items using structured internal workflows. Prepared meeting summaries, follow-up records, and stakeholder updates for project leads. Assisted with shortlisting external contractors for project support roles by checking availability, basic requirements, and documentation completeness. Did not make final contractor selection decisions and did not own structured candidate evaluation.

sections.heading: Analyst note on candidate evidence
sections.text: Has adjacent exposure to hiring workflows, but no clear evidence of independent recruitment screening ownership. No direct evidence of strategic workforce planning, talent operations strategy, or final candidate assessment responsibility. Experience is stronger in coordination and process support than in evaluative hiring judgement. Role titles across both positions indicate operational and client-facing support rather than a formal recruitment, talent partner, or talent operations function.

fixed_assessment.retrieval_query: company growth SME expansion organisational context structured screening evaluation stakeholder coordination tracking equivalent experience uncertainty recruitment recommendation applications criteria decisions dashboards direct end-to-end hold further review borderline transferable exact keywords material uncertainty human final authority
